itinerary.title: Vietnam Highlights Family Tour
itinerary.overview:
Hanoi • Halong Bay Cruise • Hoi An Ancient Town • Da Nang Beaches 07 Nights / 08 Days The Ultimate Vietnam Family Highlights Expedition SERIAL CODE: VN-002 TRAGUIN TOUR CODE: TRG-VNM-HIG-2026 STATE / COUNTRY: Vietnam CATEGORY: Best Vietnam Family Highlights Tour Package DURATION: 07 Nights / 08 Days Hanoi (2N) + Halong Bay (2N) + Da Nang/Hoi An (3N)

TOUR OVERVIEW
Discover the absolute highlights of Vietnam with our TRAGUIN curated family expedition. This comprehensive 8-day journey takes your family through the vibrant capital of Hanoi, the serene majesty of Halong Bay, and the cultural charm of Hoi An and Da Nang—creating unforgettable memories across Vietnam's iconic landscapes. THE IMMERSIVE DAY-WISE ITINERARY
itinerary.seo_title: VN-002 | Vietnam Highlights Family Tour | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 07 Nights / 08 Days Vietnam package (VN-002 / TRG-VNM-HIG-2026): Hanoi • Halong Bay Cruise • Hoi An Ancient Town • Da Nang Beaches with 4-tier handpicked accommodation.

days.title: ARRIVAL IN HANOI
days.description: Arrive in Hanoi. Private transfer to your handpicked premium hotel. Evening at leisure to enjoy the historic Old Quarter.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HANOI HIGHLIGHTS
days.description: A comprehensive city tour covering Hanoi’s most famous landmarks, providing a rich educational experience for your family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY CRUISE
days.description: Travel to Halong Bay. Board your ultra-luxury cruise vessel for an extraordinary journey through the limestone karsts.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HALONG BAY ADVENTURE
days.description: Explore hidden caves and enjoy guided activities on the water. A day filled with unforgettable memories and stunning views.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: FLIGHT TO DA NANG
days.description: Morning cruise brunch before transferring to the airport for your flight to Da Nang. Check into a luxury coastal family resort.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: HOI AN ANCIENT TOWN
days.description: Visit the charming Ancient Town of Hoi An, famous for its lantern-lit streets and rich history. A must-see highlight for any Vietnam tour.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: COASTAL LEISURE & CELEBRATION
days.description: A relaxing day at the resort, followed by a grand farewell dinner gala at a beachfront restaurant—an exclusive experience for the family.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.

days.title: DEPARTURE
days.description: Final luxury breakfast before your TRAGUIN private transfer to the airport, completing your premium Vietnam highlights expedition.
activities: Full day as per curated TRAGUIN itinerary.
